articles.title: This common sleep habit could double your risk of heart attack
articles.description: A chaotic sleep schedule in your 40s might be quietly setting the stage for heart trouble later. Researchers tracking thousands of people for over a decade found that those with highly inconsistent bedtimes—especially when they slept less than eight hours—faced about double the risk of serious cardiovascular events like heart attacks or strokes. Interestingly, it wasn’t when people woke up that mattered most, but how erratic their bedtime was.

articles.title: Postpartum pain: Causes and how to find relief
articles.description: We often talk about musculoskeletal pain—pain that occurs in the bones, joints, and other soft tissues such as muscles, cartilage, tendons, and ligaments—that women can experience during pregnancy. This includes discomfort in the lower back and hips, pelvic girdle pain, leg cramps, and more. But for some, musculoskeletal pain begins or extends into the time period following childbirth, making it important to find a solution.

articles.title: Virtual reality sessions can help autistic people navigate police encounters more effectively
articles.description: A new study led by researchers at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia and St. Joseph's University found that an innovative virtual reality intervention was helpful for improving interactions between autistic teens and adults and law enforcement officers. These findings suggest that brief, focused interventions could support the transition from adolescence into adulthood and enhance independence for those in the autism community. The findings were published in the Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorders.

articles.title: Next Lifts Outlook as Strong Sales Offset Higher Iran Costs
articles.description: Next Plc raised its profit outlook as the British fashion and homewares retailer saw robust demand at the start of the year even as costs related to the conflict in the Middle East tripled.

articles.title: Teesta Water Sharing Treaty in focus as Bangladesh hails BJP win in Bengal, calls Mamata Banerjee an ‘impediment’
articles.description: The BNP congratulated the BJP on its West Bengal victory, expressing hope for improved relations between Bangladesh and West Bengal. Azizul Baree Helal highlighted the potential for progress on the stalled Teesta Water Sharing Treaty, previously hindered by the TMC leadership.

articles.title: Orsted Keeps Guidance as Europe Focus Drives Turnaround
articles.description: Orsted A/S reaffirmed its earnings guidance for the year, as the Danish utility doubles down on its European business.

articles.title: Indus Water Treaty: Obstruction, exploitation and the long-overdue reckoning
Novo Raises Forecast as Wegovy Pill Fuels Sales
articles.description: Novo Nordisk A/S said this year’s declines won’t be as bad as initially expected thanks to the new Wegovy pill, which helped fuel sales in the first quarter. For the year, the worst drop for both profit and sales will be 12%, compared with 13% earlier. Bloomberg’s Sanne Wass reports from Copenhagen.

articles.title: Diageo Sales Beat Driven by Growth in Africa, Latin America
articles.description: Diageo Plc’s sales rose more than expected in the third quarter as growth in Africa and Latin America was enough to offset significant weakness in the US.

topStories.title: Diageo Sales Beat Driven by Growth in Africa, Latin America
topStories.description: Diageo Plc’s sales rose more than expected in the third quarter as growth in Africa and Latin America was enough to offset significant weakness in the US.

topStories.title: TVK’s Vijay hunts for allies to form govt; dissent brews in AIADMK; DMK-Congress ties shaky: What’s happening in Tamil Nadu?'
topStories.description: Actor-turned-politician Vijay's TVK is poised to form the government in Tamil Nadu, emerging as the single-largest party but needing allies. The Congress has reportedly pledged support for a secular government, a move that has drawn sharp criticism from the DMK. Meanwhile, a faction within the AIADMK is reportedly considering backing Vijay.

topStories.title: What to know about Israeli President Herzog’s trip to Central America?
topStories.description: Israeli Foreign Ministry says that four-day visit to Panama and Costa Rica will deepen ties with partners in the region.

topStories.title: Lufthansa faces nearly $2 billion in extra fuel costs amid Middle East conflict
topStories.description: Germany's largest airline, Lufthansa, is taking on additional fuel costs as the Middle East conflict poses 'enormous challenges.'

topStories.title: Is Congress backing enough for TVK to form government in Tamil Nadu? Math explained
topStories.description: Congress's support to the TVK is seen as a big gain for Vijay's party which stopped short of the majority mark in the state despite winning over 100 seats.

topStories.title: US president Trump restarts Pope feud ahead of Rubio visit to Vatican
topStories.description: Donald Trump has reignited his public attacks on Pope Leo, claiming he supports Iran obtaining nuclear weapons.

topStories.title: Kentucky man accused of kidnapping, killing woman and keeping her body under trailer before disposal
topStories.description: A Kentucky man is set to stand trial for allegedly abducting and killing a mother of three whose body was found on a roadside seven years ago.

topStories.description: Iran's foreign minister meets his Chinese counterpart one week before President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing.

topStories.title: Gaurav Gogoi Raises "Serious Concerns Over Transparency" After Assam Defeat
topStories.description: The Congress leader said that even while sitting in the Opposition, the party would continue working towards its vision of building a "new Assam".

topStories.title: US pulls the plug on Peshawar Consulate amid safety concerns for diplomatic staff
topStories.description: The U.S. will gradually close its Consulate General in Peshawar due to safety concerns, transferring responsibilities to the embassy in Islamabad while maintaining diplomatic engagement in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa despite recent unrest in Pakistan.

topStories.description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino on Tuesday defended World Cup ticket prices, insisting that football's global governing body was obliged to take advantage of US laws that allow tickets to be resold...

topStories.description: TVK won 108 seats in the 234-member House on its debut, emerging as the single largest party, while the DMK was routed to 59 seats.

dailyNews.title: Commentary: Who won the California governor debate on CNN? Here's what our columnists say
dailyNews.description: Villaraigosa had a strong night. Becerra projected steadiness. Bianco was the biggest loser. Where did all of this land with California voters?

dailyNews.title: Trump Says U.S. Pausing Efforts to Guide Ships Through Strait Blocked by Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would “remain in full force.” The shift came after the defense secretary said U.S. efforts to free trapped vessels would continue.

dailyNews.title: US pauses plan to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump has said that the US military operation guiding ships through the Strait of Hormuz will be paused.

dailyNews.title: Trump candidates beat at least 5 of 7 Indiana incumbents who opposed redistricting
dailyNews.description: Primary challengers backed by Trump will beat at least five of the seven Indiana state senators who defied him last year on redistricting, the AP projects.

dailyNews.title: Republican Derek Merrin projected to win Ohio's 9th District primary
dailyNews.description: Derek Merrin won the GOP primary in Ohio's 9th Congressional District on Tuesday, setting up a rematch against longtime Democratic Rep. Marcy Kaptur in what's expected to be one of the most contested House races of the year.

dailyNews.title: China hosts Iran's top diplomat just days ahead of Trump's high-stakes visit
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi trip to Beijing on Wednesday marks the first time he has visited China since the beginning of the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Activist who gave out fliers with Stephen Miller’s address won’t face charges
dailyNews.description: A prosecutor cited “insufficient evidence” of an intent to harass the White House aide by distributing leaflets in his Northern Virginia neighborhood.

dailyNews.title: 3 killed in U.S. strike on suspected drug boat in eastern Pacific, Pentagon says
dailyNews.description: The attack came a day after U.S. forces struck an alleged drug boat in the Caribbean Sea, killing two people.

dailyNews.title: Cameron Brink says being white and blonde gives her a marketing privilege over other WNBA players
dailyNews.description: Cameron Brink opens up about WNBA marketing privilege, endorsement gaps and financial challenges many players face despite the league's growth.

dailyNews.title: Scalise urges Pritzker to 'look at the man in the mirror' after he blames Trump for political violence
dailyNews.description: Rep. Steve Scalise urges Gov. JB Pritzker to look in the mirror after the Illinois governor blamed Trump for setting a tone on political violence.

dailyNews.title: South Carolina inmate who believes he is immortal cannot be executed due to mental illness, judge rules
dailyNews.description: A judge ruled that a South Carolina inmate who killed a state trooper is incompetent to be executed due to mental illness delusions, citing mental health experts.

dailyNews.title: FDA approves Dupixent for chronic spontaneous urticaria in young children
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved Sanofi and Regeneron's Dupixent (dupilumab) for the treatment of children (aged 2 to 11 years) with chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU).

topStories.description: The approval marks a shift after the FDA for years worked aggressively to regulate flavored vapes. The move came after President Donald Trump reportedly pressed the FDA commissioner to approve the product.

dailyNews.description: The approval marks a shift after the FDA for years worked aggressively to regulate flavored vapes. The move came after President Donald Trump reportedly pressed the FDA commissioner to approve the product.

dailyNews.title: Trump and Rubio Insist Iran War Is Over, Even as Missiles Fly During Cease-Fire
dailyNews.description: The White House is turning to rhetorical leaps as President Trump tries to put the biggest political crisis of his presidency behind him.

dailyNews.title: G.O.P. Proposes $1 Billion in Immigration Bill for Trump’s Ballroom Project
dailyNews.description: The money would go toward security improvements as part of an East Wing construction project, including a new ballroom that President Trump has said would be built with private dollars.

dailyNews.title: Most Trump-Backed Challengers Beat Indiana Incumbents Who Bucked Trump
dailyNews.description: President Trump endorsed primary opponents against seven Republican lawmakers who opposed his redistricting push. At least four of the Trump-backed candidates have won their races.

dailyNews.title: To Rename Its Airport After Trump, Palm Beach Had to License His Name
dailyNews.description: The Trumps won’t profit from airport-branded merchandise sold on site. But the agreement doesn’t prevent them from profiting off such items sold elsewhere.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Ramaswamy wins Ohio governor primary, setting up a competitive Nov. race
dailyNews.description: In Ohio, where a Democrat hasn't won an election for governor in 20 years, Republican Vivek Ramaswamy and Democrat Amy Acton could be in for a tight race this fall.

dailyNews.title: Trump pauses U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz, cites Iran deal progress
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he is pausing "Project Freedom," the U.S. military's bid to guide commercial ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump marks Cinco de Mayo with ‘NICE’ post, echoing past viral taco bowl moment
dailyNews.description: President Trump marks Cinco de Mayo with a "NICE" graphic on Truth Social, playing on ICE branding and continuing his history of viral holiday messaging.

dailyNews.title: Conan O'Brien, Zach Galifianakis say it's a 'misconception' that comedy shows only target conservatives
dailyNews.description: Conan O'Brien claims the media doesn't just want to go after conservatives, despite years of late-night comedy shows targeting Trump and the right.

dailyNews.title: Trump flexes muscle in Indiana: GOP incumbents fall in primary showdowns
dailyNews.description: Early results come in as Trump's endorsements in Indiana's Republican primary challenge eight state senators who blocked redistricting efforts.

dailyNews.title: Suspect in National Mall Shooting Expressed Hostility Toward White House, Authorities Say
dailyNews.description: Michael Marx, a 45-year-old Texan, is accused of shooting at Secret Service agents by the Washington Monument on Monday.

dailyNews.title: Trump pauses Project Freedom in Strait of Hormuz to see if Iran deal can be struck
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Tuesday he has paused Project Freedom, a U.S. effort to guide commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump pausing Project Freedom for short period
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced Tuesday night that he's pausing Project Freedom for "a short period of time" to see if an agreement with Iran can be finalized.
